typography.strategy: CLI-inspired interface combining strict monospace for headings/data with clean geometric sans for readability in body text.

hierarchy.code_blocks: text-sm font-mono bg-zinc-900 p-4 border border-zinc-800

colors.strategy: Dark graphite/charcoal surfaces with high-contrast muted neon accents. Avoid pure black.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Dense, compact spacing to maximize data visibility without overwhelming the user.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8. Use generous internal padding for containers to prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm. Keep it sharp and brutalist.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: No soft drop shadows. Rely on 1px solid borders and subtle inner glows or hard shadows if needed.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders strategy. Expose the skeleton with visible border lines on cards and containers.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use subtle drop-shadows on active terminal text. drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(52,211,153,0.5)]
visual_enhancers.textures: Include subtle CSS repeating-linear-gradient for scanlines on empty states or hero headers.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 text-zinc-950 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-emerald-400 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 bg-transparent hover:border-emerald-500/50 hover:text-emerald-400 transition-colors

cards_and_widgets.style: Flat background (zinc-900/50), 1px solid border-zinc-800, no shadow. Sharp corners.

inputs_and_forms.style: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-emerald-500. Monospace font for input values.
inputs_and_forms.labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-400 mb-2 block

navigation.style: Solid zinc-950 background with a hard bottom/right border-zinc-800. Sticky positioning with z-50.

data_displays.tables: Dense layout, uppercase headers, hover states on rows. Avoid excessive padding.
data_displays.badges: Monospace, uppercase, border border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500/10 px-2 py-1 text-xs

motion.strategy: Minimalist and instant. Micro-interactions for feedback only.
motion.loaders: ASCII art loaders, blinking cursors, or simple monospace text counters (e.g., [ 0% ] -> [ 100% ]).

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for body text. Text shadows used over any visual noise.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus states required. focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-zinc-950
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-resume-button').

icons.style: Sharp, technical, and precise. Set stroke-width to 1.5 or 2.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark matrix code terminal background. Use with low opacity (10-20%) for landing page hero or empty states.
A man in front of monitors (DevOps hacker vibe) for decorative usage in about sections or auth screens.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: lucide-react, recharts, sonner, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the main layout to preserve the exact 'terminal' aesthetic, but use Shadcn for complex components like Dialog, Select, Tabs.
CRITICAL: Strip Vercel-like styles from Shadcn components. Remove rounded corners (rounded-md -> rounded-none), remove soft box shadows, and use solid zinc-800 borders.
Build a robust Dashboard layout using CSS Grid. Use the 'Control Room Grid' pattern.
Implement an API settings modal/panel where users can enter their OpenAI/Gemini API key. Ensure the input type is password.
For the Job List, include clear badge components for 'DevOps', 'SRE', and 'Cloud Architect'.
For the Match Score feature, use bold typography and color-coding (Emerald > 80%, Amber 50-80%, Rose < 50%). Consider a circular progress component or progress bar.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to every form, input, and action button for end-to-end testing.
Add toast notifications (via sonner) for key actions: Job Scraping Complete, Resume Uploaded, Tailored Resume Generated.
Never use generic purple or teal gradients. Stick to the graphite, emerald, and amber palette.
